perspectives.description: The DECIDER is the friend who has developed feelings for Emily and must choose whether to confess these feelings, risking their friendship with Jake.
The PRIMARY_AFFECTED is Emily, Jake's girlfriend, who is unaware of the feelings developing from her friend and will be impacted by the decision made by the DECIDER.
The THIRD_PARTY is Jake, who is a close friend of the DECIDER and is likely to be affected by the outcome of the DECIDER's choice regarding Emily.
